name: Fiesta Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Monterey Jack cheese with peppers (shredded)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tortilla chips and butter; press onto the bottom of a lightly greased 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325°F for 15 minutes. Cool on a wire rack.
3. Beat cream cheese with an electric mixer until fluffy, about 3 minutes. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Stir in the cheese, chiles, and ground red pepper. Pour into prepared pan.
5. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes. Cool for 10 minutes on a wire rack.
6. Place on a bed of fresh cilantro or parsley if desired.
7. Gently run a knife around the edge of the pan to release sides, then let cool completely.
8. Spread sour cream evenly over top; cover and chill.
9. Arrange green pepper and remaining ingredients on top as desired.
